baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 41 runtime mode kill-switch status-gap refresh validation
baseline.baseline_boundary: Phases 1-41 are committed as local read-only, proposal-only, or validation-only Mira Core artifacts. No UI implementation, browser/window/capture access, runtime, server, listener, route, network, database, store, file migration, queue, lease, auth, key, secret, local execution, shell, PTY, control execution, reporting sink, send, deploy, trade, output-file, durable memory/profile commit, export, delete, restore, or raw-content storage behavior exists at this baseline.

purpose: Define the fixture-only prerequisite boundary that must remain true before any later runtime mode flag reader or kill-switch wiring proposal can be considered.
Pin phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry coverage through Phases 1-41.
Record that the Phase41 Tier0 recommendation phase42-runtime-mode-kill-switch-status-gap-refresh-validator is satisfied by 833f9c1 and must not be repeated as open work.
Select Phase41 Tier1 recommendation phase42-runtime-mode-kill-switch-prerequisite-boundary-contract as fixture-only work.
Preserve Phase35, Phase36, Phase37, Phase38, Phase39, Phase40, and Phase41 as current validation truth while keeping stale Phase13, Phase23, and Phase31 truth intact.
Keep runtime mode disabled/default-off, local/dev-only, reference-only, unimplemented, flagReader=false, flagReadNow=false, and non-authorizing.
Keep kill switch visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, killWired=false, liveCheck=false, and non-authorizing.
Keep runtime-mode-flag and live-kill-switch gaps unsatisfied, blocking runtime/dry-run now, reference-only, and non-authorizing.
nonGoals: No browser, window, screenshot, OCR, or capture access.
No runtime implementation or runtime start.
No runtime mode flag reader implementation or flag read.
No kill-switch wiring, execution, or live check.
No rollback execution, reporting sink, store, queue, lease, or output-file behavior.
No server, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, or network behavior.
No database, store, file migration, auth, token, session, signing, key, encryption, KMS, env secret, or secret material behavior.
No local execution, shell, PTY, send, deploy, trade, financial action, export, delete, restore, memory/profile commit, or raw-content storage behavior.

No claim that prerequisite boundary labels, runtime mode status, kill-switch status, status/gap records, socket connection, delivery acceptance, commit status, or this fixture proves runtime availability, model processing, bridge green, local-arm execution, control execution, flag reading, kill-switch wiring, or runner execution.

future_green_requires: actual local flag reader implementation in a later scoped phase

tests proving disabled switch blocks any runtime/dry-run path

staticValidationRules.description: Prerequisite boundary baseline_commit must equal 833f9c1.
Phase41 must be marked current and committed at 833f9c1.
Phase35 runtime next-action truth must remain current.
Phase36 operator UI surface truth must remain current.
Phase37 control/reporting reconciliation truth must remain current.
Phase38 runtime readiness refresh truth must remain current.
Phase39 disabled local dry-run readiness gap truth must remain current.
Phase40 runtime mode / kill-switch reference truth must remain current.
Phase inventory must cover exactly committed Phases 1-41.
Schema registry must cover exactly 41 phases.
CLI registry must cover exactly 41 phases.
Commit chain must include Phase 1-13 package plus Phase 14-41 commits in order and end at 833f9c1.
Phase41 Tier1 prerequisite boundary recommendation must be selected as contract-only work.
Phase41 Tier0 status-gap refresh validator recommendation must be satisfied by 833f9c1 and not reopened.
Phase34 prior recommendations remain satisfied and closed.
Prior stale Phase13 readiness truth must be preserved.
Prior stale Phase23 readiness truth must be preserved.
Phase31 runtime milestone refresh must remain stale/superseded by Phase34.
Source refs must include Phase26/27/29/30/32/33/37/38/39/40/41 artifacts.
Recent Phase37/38/39/40/41 fixture/module/CLI/test paths must be named for future reference checks.
Prerequisite boundary must remain contract-only, non-authorizing, and blocking for runtime/dry-run now.
Runtime mode boundary must be disabled, local/dev only, reference-only, unimplemented, no flag read, and non-authorizing.
Kill-switch boundary must be visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, no live check, and non-authorizing.
Prerequisite gap matrix must include exactly runtime mode flag implementation and live kill-switch wiring, both unsatisfied and blocking.
Prerequisite boundary records may describe future required gates but must not mark either gap satisfied now.
runtimeStarted, runnerExecuted, runtimeAvailable, serverCanExecuteLocal, serverCanProveModelProcessing, and direct Builder/Oracle targets must stay false.
Socket, delivery acceptance, Phase41 commit, prerequisite boundary, runtime mode boundary, and kill-switch boundary cannot become proof or authorization.
All no-side-effect truth fields must remain true.
Phase42 Oracle contract must not include module, CLI, test, runtime, UI, flag-read, kill-switch wiring, reporting sink, or output-file behavior.
No raw/private/terminal/screenshot/browser/secret/customer-private content may be included.
Next recommendations must be Tier0/Tier1 only and non-authorizing.
Recommendations and narrative fields must reject customer-send/deploy/trade/file-write/store-write/local-execution/control-execution/flag-read/kill-switch-wire/reporting-sink drift.
Validation report must include required literal checks and bind their ok values to recomputed fixture-required literals.
Validation report static, acceptance, tamper, required literal, and referenced path results must match fixture IDs/counts and expected failures.

Equivalent manifest inputs produce stable idempotency; phase registry, prerequisite boundary, runtime mode boundary, kill-switch boundary, gap matrix, source recommendation, closure, baseline, or commit changes alter idempotency.

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.action: implement validation-only runtime mode / kill-switch prerequisite boundary report against this fixture
nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.why_safe: data-only prerequisite validation for committed Phases 1-41; no module beyond validator/report, no UI rendering, browser/window/capture, runtime, network, store, queue, lease, control execution, reporting sink, send, deploy, trade, flag read, kill-switch wiring, or output-file behavior

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.action: create fixture-only implementation-risk contract before proposing any later flag-reader or kill-switch wiring slice
nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.why_safe: contract-only risk work that keeps runtime mode disabled, kill switch unwired, runtime/dry-run unavailable, all side effects blocked, and proof boundaries false before implementation scope is considered

summaryCriteria: Fixture remains the only Phase42 file created by Oracle.
Phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry requirements cover exactly Phases 1-41.
Commit chain contains Phase 1-13 package plus Phase 14-41 scoped commits and ends at 833f9c1.
Source recommendation phase42-runtime-mode-kill-switch-prerequisite-boundary-contract is selected as Tier1 fixture-only work.
Phase41 Tier0 recommendation phase42-runtime-mode-kill-switch-status-gap-refresh-validator is satisfied by 833f9c1 and not reopened.
Phase35, Phase36, Phase37, Phase38, Phase39, Phase40, and Phase41 are current; stale Phase13, Phase23, and Phase31 truth is preserved.
Phase34 prior recommendations remain satisfied and not reopened.
ORACLE #115, ORACLE #123, ORACLE #127, ORACLE #131, ORACLE #134, ORACLE #137, ORACLE #141, ORACLE #148, ORACLE #149, ORACLE #156, ORACLE #161, and ORACLE #165 closures are explicit.
Source refs include Phase26, Phase27, Phase29, Phase30, Phase32, Phase33, Phase37, Phase38, Phase39, Phase40, and Phase41 artifacts.
Runtime mode boundary remains disabled, local/dev only, reference-only, unimplemented, no flag reader/read, and non-authorizing.
Kill-switch boundary remains visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, no live check, and non-authorizing.
Prerequisite gap matrix includes exactly runtime mode flag implementation and live kill-switch wiring, both unsatisfied, blocking runtime/dry-run now, and non-authorizing.

Capability and proof boundaries keep runtimeStarted=false, runnerExecuted=false, runtimeAvailable=false, serverCanExecuteLocal=false, serverCanProveModelProcessing=false, direct Builder/Oracle targets blocked, and proof boundaries false.

All side-effect truth fields preserve no module/CLI/test implementation, UI/runtime/server/listener/network/db/store/file migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/local execution/shell/PTY/browser/window/capture/control execution/reporting sink/send/deploy/trade/flag-read/kill-switch-wiring/output-file behavior.

Next recommendations are Tier0/Tier1 only, non-authorizing, and do not recommend live UI, browser/window/capture access, live runtime, customer send, deploy, trade, output files, store writes, queue/lease creation, control execution, reporting sink, flag read, kill-switch wiring, or local execution.
